summary: Phase 5: AI Ad Creative Generation tested and working. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified after fixing localStorage token key bug. Fixed AdCreativeSection.jsx to use correct token key 'trendscout_token'.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/ad-creatives/generate/{product_id} returns success=true with creatives
Backend: Response contains creatives object with all required fields
Backend: tiktok_scripts array - each has title, hook, script, cta fields
Backend: facebook_ads array - each has headline, primary_text, description, cta_button fields
Backend: instagram_captions array - each has caption and hashtags array
Backend: product_angles array - each has angle, target_audience, hook fields
Backend: headlines is array of 5 strings
Backend: video_storyboard array - 6 scenes with scene, duration, visual, text_overlay, audio
Backend: shot_list array - 5 shots with type, description, purpose
Backend: voiceover_script is non-empty string
Backend: GET /api/ad-creatives/{product_id} returns cached creatives
Backend: GET for non-cached product returns message to use POST
Backend: Endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST with invalid product_id returns 404
Backend: Response has provider field (openai/anthropic/gemini)
Backend: Response has generated_at timestamp
Backend: Response has product_name field
Frontend: Product detail page shows 'AI Ad Creatives' section
Frontend: Section shows 'Generate Ad Creatives' button when no creatives exist
Frontend: After generation, shows 5 tabs: TikTok, Facebook, Instagram, Video, Strategy
Frontend: TikTok tab shows scripts with Hook (red label), Script, and CTA sections
Frontend: TikTok tab has copy buttons
Frontend: Facebook tab shows ads with headlines, primary text, CTA buttons (Shop Now)
Frontend: Instagram tab shows captions with emojis and hashtag badges
Frontend: Video tab shows Storyboard collapsible (6 scenes with duration, visual, text, audio)
Frontend: Video tab shows Shot List collapsible
Frontend: Video tab shows Voiceover Script collapsible
Frontend: Strategy tab shows Product Angles with target audiences
Frontend: Strategy tab shows Headline Variations with copy buttons
Frontend: Regenerate button present in section header
critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fixed: AdCreativeSection.jsx was using localStorage.getItem('token') but auth stores token with key 'trendscout_token'. Fixed by updating to use 'trendscout_token'.
LLM integration is REAL using emergentintegrations.llm.chat.LlmChat with Emergent LLM Key -> OpenAI GPT-4.1-mini
Provider abstraction layer properly supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini via PROVIDERS config
Creatives are cached in MongoDB ad_creatives collection with upsert on product_id
seed_data_creation: None - cached creatives exist for product 68f41478-9ca2-48c6-997d-b121e2ef8ee9
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 AI Ad Creative Generation tested and working. Key endpoints: POST /api/ad-creatives/generate/{product_id} generates via OpenAI GPT-4.1-mini (takes 10-15 seconds), GET /api/ad-creatives/{product_id} retrieves cached. Frontend AdCreativeSection.jsx fixed to use correct localStorage key 'trendscout_token'. Creatives stored in MongoDB ad_creatives collection. The response includes: tiktok_scripts (title, hook, script, cta), facebook_ads (headline, primary_text, description, cta_button), instagram_captions (caption, hashtags), product_angles (angle, target_audience, hook), headlines (array), video_storyboard (6 scenes), shot_list (5 shots), voiceover_script (string).

backend_generate.POST /api/ad-creatives/generate/{product: PASS - generates via LLM, returns success=true

backend_get.non-cached product: PASS - returns null creatives with message

frontend_section.ad_creative_section: PASS - present on product detail page
frontend_section.tabs_after_generation: PASS - 5 tabs (TikTok, Facebook, Instagram, Video, Strategy)
frontend_section.regenerate_button: PASS - in header when creatives exist

frontend_video_tab.storyboard_collapsible: PASS - 6 scenes with duration, visual, text, audio
frontend_video_tab.shot_list_collapsible: PASS - 5 shots with type, description, purpose

bug_fixed.issue: AdCreativeSection.jsx was using wrong localStorage key 'token' instead of 'trendscout_token'
bug_fixed.root_cause: AuthContext.jsx stores token with key 'trendscout_token' (TOKEN_KEY constant) but component was hardcoded to read 'token'
bug_fixed.fix: Updated localStorage.getItem('token') to localStorage.getItem('trendscout_token') in both fetchCreatives() and handleGenerate() functions
